title: HeadyWeb — Unified AI Portal with 7 Federated Apps
description: HeadyWeb is the micro-frontend portal for the Heady ecosystem — seven federated AI apps in one workspace. SSO, drag-drop builder, white-label, real-time collaboration, and custom domains for teams and builders.
ogTitle: HeadyWeb — One Portal. Seven Apps. Infinite Possibilities.
ogDescription: The unified micro-frontend AI portal — HeadyDash, HeadyChat, HeadyDocs, HeadyFlow, HeadyStore, HeadyMetrics, and HeadyAdmin in one seamless workspace. SSO, white-label, drag-drop builder.
twitterDescription: 7 federated AI apps. 1 login. Drag-drop builder, white-label, SSO, real-time collaboration. The command center for the Heady ecosystem.

structuredData.name: HeadyWeb
structuredData.description: Unified micro-frontend AI portal with 7 federated apps, SSO, white-label, and real-time collaboration.
